name: Rice Porridge & Corn (Yumi Zhou)
recipeInstructions:
--------------------------
GARNISH
- 2 teaspoons Roasted Sichuan peppercorns (crushed)
In Chinese, this dish is called Yumi Zhou and can be eaten for breakfast or lunch, or as part of a full dinner.
1. Bring the water to a boil in a large pot. Add the salt and then the rice. Bring back to a boil, stir several times, cover loosely, and let the rice simmer on the lowest possible heat for 40 minutes.
2. Add the corn and simmer for an additional 20 minutes. Stir in the scallions and chili bean sauce.
3. Just before serving, sprinkle the roasted ground Sichuan peppercorns on top.
